articles.title: How the World Cup playoffs work: Italy must win two. Here's who
articles.summary: To qualify for the 2026 World Cup, coach Rino Gattuso's Italy will have to play in a semi-final, which Italy will play at home against Northern Ireland today in Bergamo, 8pm.
